name: Backstartup
description: Developer of accounting and legal automation platform designed to aid in the management of business activities. The company's platform offers the processing of documents and generating financial statements while liquidating national and municipal taxes in time and also provides legal advice and monthly payroll calculation of employees, enabling businesses to focus on the core activities of the company while maintaining productivity.

name: Cuida Mi Mascota
description: Developer of a pet care platform designed to assist people to find trusted caregivers. The company's platform connects pet owners who are looking for where to leave their pets when they travel or just for the day with pet sitters who take care of their beloved pets decreasing the stress and separation anxiety, enabling pet owners to leave their pets behind while traveling.

name: EcomExperts
description: Operator of an e-commerce management platform intended to help businesses of all sizes succeed online. The company offers a wide range of features, including website design and development, marketing and advertising, and fulfillment and shipping, enabling businesses to sell their products and services to a global audience and achieve their e-commerce goals.

name: Tarefa
description: Operator of a digital educational platform designed to help students to improve their learning skills. The company's platform offers courses on a subscription basis, connects students with professional teachers in order to teach, solve and provide answers to users' math exercises, enabling students to post their difficult queries to be solved online in an efficient manner.

name: Yetcargo
description: Developer of a logistics platform designed to connect carriers with cargo owners. The company provides real-time tracking of cargo and claims to have a portfolio of reliable carriers, enabling businesses in product shipment and transportation by connecting and dealing with air and marine logistics service providers.

name: HostTonight
description: Provider of Airbnb management platform intended to manage short term rentals and Airbnb listings. The company's platform offers key exchange and check-in, welcome kits and cleaning services, improves response rate and help guests and give them tips and recommendations, offers listing optimization services to help guests manage their expectations when they book listing, enabling users to give their guests the possible experience and manage everything while wasting time.
